description: Composition Beige printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a U-neck and pin-tucks that start at the chest and flare at the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Model statistics The product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
